mapper.select: select id, year, club_code, io_type, trade_type, trade_time, subject, amount, creator, remark, create_time, update_time from tb_club where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_club(year, club_code, io_type, trade_type, trade_time, subject, amount, creator, remark, create_time, update_time) values (#{year}, #{clubCode}, #{ioType}, #{tradeType}, #{tradeTime}, #{subject}, #{amount}, #{creator}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into tb_club(year, club_code, io_type, trade_type, trade_time, subject, amount, creator, remark, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.year}, #{entity.clubCode}, #{entity.ioType}, #{entity.tradeType}, #{entity.tradeTime}, #{entity.subject}, #{entity.amount}, #{entity.creator}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into tb_club(year, club_code, io_type, trade_type, trade_time, subject, amount, creator, remark, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.year}, #{entity.clubCode}, #{entity.ioType}, #{entity.tradeType}, #{entity.tradeTime}, #{entity.subject}, #{entity.amount}, #{entity.creator}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update year = values(year), club_code = values(club_code), io_type = values(io_type), trade_type = values(trade_type), trade_time = values(trade_time), subject = values(subject), amount = values(amount), creator = values(creator), remark = values(remark), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_club
year = #{year},
club_code = #{clubCode},
io_type = #{ioType},
trade_type = #{tradeType},
trade_time = #{tradeTime},
subject = #{subject},
amount = #{amount},
creator = #{creator},
remark = #{remark},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
